en.ch0Step1Heading: How to set up your Gmail account
en.ch0Step1VideoPH: How-to clips — Create a Gmail account, set up a password, and complete phone verification
en.ch0Step2Heading: Practice setting up an email account
en.ch0Step2Intro: Rosa needs to create a Gmail account so she can register for MyChart.
en.ch0Step2Intro2: Help her choose an email address, create a password, and verify her phone number.
en.ch0Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch0Step3Heading: Now set up your own email account
en.ch0Step3Intro: Open a web browser on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch0Check1: Open a web browser. Go to the Gmail website. Tap "Create account." Enter your first and last name. Choose a new email address. Tap "Next."
en.ch0Check2: Type your chosen password. Type your password again to confirm. Tap "Next."
en.ch0Check3: Enter your phone number. Tap "Next." Type the code you received in a text message. Tap "Verify."
en.ch0Check4: Write your email address on your card. Write your password on your card.
en.ch01Step1Heading: How to set up your MyChart account
en.ch01Step1VideoPH: How-to clips — Download MyChart, register, create a username and password, set up 2FA, log in, and set your language
en.ch01Step2Heading: Help Rosa set up her language settings
en.ch01Step2Intro: Rosa just registered for MyChart. She wants to make sure the app is in her preferred language.
en.ch01Step2Intro2: Help her find the Settings menu and change her language and notification preferences.
en.ch01Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch01Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch01Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch01Check1: Download the MyChart app or go to the BMC MyChart website.
en.ch01Check2: Follow the prompts to register using your information or activation code.
en.ch01Check3: Create your MyChart username and password.
en.ch01Check4: Set up Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) using your phone number.
en.ch01Check5: Log in to your new MyChart account.
en.ch01Check6: Tap the Menu icon and go to "Settings."
en.ch01Check7: Tap "Language" and select your preferred language.
en.ch01Check8: Tap "Notifications" and turn on the options you want (like text message reminders).
en.ch02Step1Heading: How to join a video visit on your phone
en.ch02Step1VideoPH: How-to clip — Join a video visit via MyChart app
en.ch02Step2Intro: Marcus needs to join a video visit from his phone during his lunch break.
en.ch02Step2Intro2: Help him find his appointment and tap Begin Visit.
en.ch02Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch02Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch02Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch02Check1: Open the MyChart app on your phone.
en.ch02Check3: Find today's video visit in the list.
en.ch02Check5: Wait in the waiting room. Your provider will join you.
en.ch03Step1Heading: How to manage your health in MyChart
en.ch03Step1VideoPH: How-to clips — Request a medication refill, schedule a follow-up appointment, and send a secure message
en.ch03Step2Intro: Elena manages her mother Clara's health. Clara needs a refill on her blood pressure medicine.
en.ch03Step2Intro2: Help Elena find the Medications tile and send a message to Clara's doctor.
en.ch03Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch03Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch03Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch03Check1: Tap the Medications tile. Find a medicine you are taking and practice tapping "Request Refill." Stop before confirming.
en.ch03Check2: Tap the Appointments tile. Tap "Schedule a New Appointment." Practice selecting your doctor and choosing a date. Cancel before confirming.
en.ch03Check3: Tap the Messages tile. Tap "New Message." Select your Navigator Person as the recipient.
en.ch03Check4: Type a short message, like "Hello, I completed Challenge 03."
en.ch04Step1Heading: How to manage family accounts in MyChart
en.ch04Step1VideoPH: How-to clips — Set up proxy access in Sharing Hub, switch between linked accounts, and review notification settings
en.ch04Step2Heading: Help Elena set up access to Leo's account
en.ch04Step2Intro: Elena needs to set up proxy access so she can see her grandson Leo's health information and book his appointments.
en.ch04Step2Intro2: Help her find the Sharing Hub and set up her caregiver access.
en.ch04Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch04Step3Heading: Now try it on your own MyChart
en.ch04Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch04Check3: Practice finding the "Invite Someone" button. Do not send a real invite.
en.ch04Check4: Tap your name or the Account icon at the top of the screen.
en.ch04Check5: Practice selecting a linked family member's name (if you have one).
en.ch04Check6: Go to "Settings" and review your "Notifications" one more time.
en.ch05Step1Heading: How to find community resources with MassThrive
en.ch05Step1VideoPH: How-to clips — Find MassThrive in MyChart, change language, search by ZIP code, read a program card, and contact an organization
en.ch05Step2Heading: Help Victor find a food pantry
en.ch05Step2Intro: Victor needs to find a food pantry close to his home using MassThrive.
en.ch05Step2Intro2: Help him search by ZIP code and find the contact information on a program card.
en.ch05Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 — Do it on your phone
en.ch05Step3Heading: Now try it on your own phone
en.ch05Step3Intro: Open MyChart on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch05Check1: Tap the Menu icon in MyChart.
en.ch05Check2: Tap "Community" or "Find Resources" to open MassThrive.
en.ch05Check3: Look for the language toggle on the MassThrive website and practice changing the language.
en.ch05Check4: Type your ZIP code into the search bar.
en.ch05Check5: Select a category (like Food or Housing) from the dropdown menu.
en.ch05Check6: Tap on a program card and find the contact phone number.
en.ch05Check7: Self-practice: Dial 2-1-1 on your phone, then hang up before anyone answers.
